Indicator: The network also used AI-generated content to make its accounts appear more authentic to local users, including in the Page’s visual branding, such as profile photos and advertisements promoting the Page, as well as in its influence operation materials.
In some cases, the network shared opinion articles published by legitimate news websites that carried bylines falsely attributed to real individuals or attributed to entirely fictitious personas.
The threat actors posed as local, grassroots news sources.
The network engaged in around $7,000 in spending for ads on Facebook and Instagram, paid for mostly in Euros and US Dollars.

Technique: 7.2 Engaging with users outside the operation
Indicator: About 30,000 accounts followed one or more of these Pages
